Hotel Rwanda (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $23,519,128Details
International Box Office $13,001,323
Worldwide Box Office $36,520,451
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$100,091 (0.4% of total gross)
Legs:10.15 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:64.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$17,500,000 (worldwide box office is 2.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:7 opening theaters/824 max. theaters, 7.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $43,863,776

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 22nd, 2004 (Limited) by MGM
International Releases: February 25th, 2005 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: April 12th, 2005 by MGM Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 on appeal for violence, disturbing images and brief strong language.
Running Time: 121 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Voiceover/Narration
Plot point: Bigotry, Crimes Against Humanity, Genocide, Government Corruption, Government Massacre or Democide, War, War Crimes
Subgenre: Historical Drama
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: United Artists, The Industrial Development Corporation, Miracle Pictures, Seamus, Lionsgate, Inside Track
Production Countries: United Kingdom
